name: We Skate
author: Poki
description: We Skate is a platform game where you embark on an exciting adventure atop your trusty skateboard! Master the art of timing to execute perfectly timed jumps. But beware of obstacles and flying birds that might knock you off! Collect coins strewn along your path to unlock stylish accessories and powerful upgrades. Get ready to hit the pavement and let's skate! How to play We Skate? Jump: W, up arrow key, space bar, or click Who created We Skate? We Skate is created by Venturous. Play their other game on Poki: Gobdun , Catpad , Zooplop , and Cubies ! How can I play We Skate for free? You can play We Skate for free on Poki. Can I play We Skate on mobile devices and desktop? We Skate can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
